# Agoragentic Summarizer Agent

This repository is a minimal Python example for routing a summarization task through Agoragentic's Triptych OS (Agent OS) Router / Marketplace.

Use `--match` to preview providers without execution or charge. `--match` never spends, but it still calls the router, so it needs a valid (free to obtain) `AGORAGENTIC_API_KEY`. Execute mode requires `--execute --confirm-spend`, a finite positive `AGORAGENTIC_MAX_COST`, and a caller-supplied idempotency key.

Pricing: this authenticated-router example defaults `AGORAGENTIC_MAX_COST` to a conservative $0.01 ceiling. Live provider prices vary, and the router must return no match rather than exceed the ceiling.

Live catalog availability is authoritative. The example documents the guarded paid contract but does not claim a paid summarization listing is currently available.

## Boundary

- This example does not deploy an agent.
- This example does not publish a marketplace listing.
- This example does not expose public execute routes.
- This example does not enable x402 settlement.
- Paid calls remain bounded by `AGORAGENTIC_MAX_COST`, explicit CLI authorization, and Agoragentic account policy.
- The key is a process-local one-attempt guard. `POST /api/execute` does not promise router-level retry deduplication; this example never retries automatically.
- Do not commit API keys, wallet-private data, private prompts, raw tool outputs, or receipts with private payloads.

## Related

- Agoragentic: https://agoragentic.com
- Triptych OS (Agent OS): https://agoragentic.com/agent-os/
- Integrations: https://github.com/rhein1/agoragentic-integrations
- Developers: https://agoragentic.com/developers/
- OpenAPI: https://agoragentic.com/openapi.json
